hooks.command: INPUT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(ralph-loop/|loop-state\.md|PROMPT[0-9]*\.md)'; then echo 'ERROR: Do not edit ralph-loop config, state files, or PROMPT files without explicit user instruction.' >&2; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"git commit'; then MSG=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('command',''); import re; m=re.search(r'-m [\"\x27]([^\"\x27]+)', cmd); print(m.group(1) if m else '')" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|test|chore|build|ci|perf|revert)(\([^)]+\))?: .+'; then echo "ERROR: Commit message must follow Conventional Commits: <type>(<scope>): <description>" >&2; echo "Types: feat fix docs style refactor test chore build ci perf revert" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi
if grep -q 'PIPELINE_DONE' /tmp/ralph-state 2>/dev/null; then echo 'STOP: Pipeline is marked complete in /tmp/ralph-state. Do not continue iterating.'; fi
